fragment:
<set-variable name="api-type" value="@{
        try {
            var path = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("routing-processed-path", String.Empty).ToLower();
            string bestName = String.Empty;
            int bestLength = -1;
            var apiTypes = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("config-api-types");
            if (apiTypes != null) {
                foreach (var prop in apiTypes.Children()) {
                    var basePath = prop.Value["base-path"]?.ToString();
                    if (String.IsNullOrEmpty(basePath)) { continue; }
                    var basePathLower = basePath.ToLower();
                    if (path.StartsWith(basePathLower, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)
                        && basePathLower.Length > bestLength) {
                        bestName = prop.Name;
                        bestLength = basePathLower.Length;
                    }
                }
            }
            return bestName;
        } catch { return String.Empty; }
    }" />

    
    
        <when condition="@(String.IsNullOrEmpty(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", String.Empty)))">
            
                @($"Unified AI - Blocked request to {context.Request.Method} {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("routing-processed-path", "unknown")} from {context.Request.IpAddress}")
            
            
                
                
                    application/json
                
                {"error": {"code": "PathNotAllowed", "message": "The requested path is not allowed."}}
            
        
    

            
            <set-variable name="api-type-config" value="@{
        var apiType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", "openai");
        return context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("config-api-types")?[apiType] as JObject;
    }" />
    <set-variable name="api-base-path" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type-config")?["base-path"]?.ToString() ?? "/openai")" />
    <set-variable name="api-path-segment" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type-config")?["path-segment"]?.ToString() ?? String.Empty)" />

    
    
    <set-variable name="apiTypeOverrideBackend" value="@{
        var apiTypeConfig = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type-config");
        return apiTypeConfig?["backend"]?.ToString() ?? String.Empty;
    }" />

    
    

    
    
        
            
        
        
            <set-variable name="parsed-request-body" value="@{
                try {
                    return JObject.Parse(context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true));
                } catch {
                    return new JObject();
                }
            }" />
            
            <set-variable name="is-streaming" value="@{
                var body = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("parsed-request-body");
                var streamValue = body?["stream"];
                return streamValue != null && streamValue.Type == JTokenType.Boolean && streamValue.Value();
            }" />
        
    

    
    <set-variable name="requestedModel" value="@{
        try {
            var apiType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", "openai");
            var method = context.Request.Method;

            // GET requests are non-LLM operations (deployment listings, etc.)
            if (method.Equals("GET", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
            {
                return "non-llm-request";
            }

            // DELETE requests on responses API don't need a model
            if (method.Equals("DELETE", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) && apiType.StartsWith("responses"))
            {
                return "non-llm-request";
            }

            // Try body first (works for all API types)
            var bodyModel = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("parsed-request-body")?["model"]?.ToString();
            if (!String.IsNullOrEmpty(bodyModel))
            {
                return bodyModel;
            }

            // Try path extraction using api-path-segment (e.g., /openai/deployments/{model}/...)
            var segment = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-path-segment", String.Empty);
            if (!String.IsNullOrEmpty(segment))
            {
                var path = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("routing-processed-path", String.Empty);
                var idx = path.IndexOf(segment + "/", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
                if (idx >= 0)
                {
                    var afterSegment = path.Substring(idx + segment.Length + 1);
                    var modelName = afterSegment.Split('/')[0];
                    if (!String.IsNullOrEmpty(modelName))
                    {
                        return modelName;
                    }
                }
            }
        } catch { }
        return String.Empty;
    }" />

    
    <set-variable name="openai-compat-operation" value="@{
        var apiType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", "");
        if (!apiType.Equals("openai-compat", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)) {
            return String.Empty;
        }
        var path = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("routing-processed-path", "");
        // Remove /v1/ prefix to get the operation
        var idx = path.IndexOf("/v1/", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
        if (idx >= 0) {
            return path.Substring(idx + 4).TrimEnd('/');
        }
        var trimmed = path.TrimStart('/');
        return trimmed.Substring(Math.Min(3, trimmed.Length)).TrimStart('/');
    }" />

    
    
        <when condition="@{
            var op = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("openai-compat-operation", "");
            return op.StartsWith("responses/", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);
        }">
            <set-variable name="response-id" value="@{
                var op = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("openai-compat-operation", "");
                var parts = op.Split('/');
                return parts.Length > 1 ? parts[1] : String.Empty;
            }" />
            
        
    

    
    
    
    
    
        <when condition="@{
            var model = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("requestedModel", "");
            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(model) || model == "non-llm-request") { return false; }
            var aliases = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("config-model-aliases");
            return aliases != null && aliases.Property(model) != null;
        }">
            <set-variable name="original-model-alias" value="@(context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("requestedModel", ""))" />
            
            <set-variable name="alias-models" value="@{
                var alias = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("requestedModel", "");
                var aliases = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("config-model-aliases");
                if (aliases == null) { return new JArray(); }
                var prop = aliases.Property(alias);
                if (prop == null) { return new JArray(); }
                var aliasEntry = prop.Value as JObject;
                if (aliasEntry == null) { return new JArray(); }
                var modelsProp = aliasEntry.Property("models");
                if (modelsProp == null) { return new JArray(); }
                var models = modelsProp.Value as JArray;
                return models ?? new JArray();
            }" />
            <set-variable name="requestedModel" value="@{
                var alias = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("original-model-alias", "");
                var aliases = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("config-model-aliases");
                if (aliases == null) { return alias; }
                var prop = aliases.Property(alias);
                if (prop == null) { return alias; }
                var aliasConfig = prop.Value as JObject;
                if (aliasConfig == null) { return alias; }
                var modelsProp = aliasConfig.Property("models");
                if (modelsProp == null) { return alias; }
                var models = modelsProp.Value as JArray;
                if (models == null || models.Count == 0) { return alias; }

                var strategyProp = aliasConfig.Property("strategy");
                var strategy = strategyProp != null ? strategyProp.Value.ToString() : "priority";
                if (strategy.Equals("weighted", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))
                {
                    // Weighted round-robin using cache counter
                    var weightsProp = aliasConfig.Property("weights");
                    var weights = weightsProp != null ? weightsProp.Value as JArray : null;
                    if (weights != null && weights.Count == models.Count)
                    {
                        var productId = context.Product != null ? context.Product.Id : "default";
                        var cacheKey = "alias-counter-" + alias + "-" + productId;
                        int counter = 0;
                        try {
                            if (context.Variables.ContainsKey(cacheKey)) {
                                var cached = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault(cacheKey, "");
                                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(cached)) { int.TryParse(cached, out counter); }
                            }
                        } catch { }

                        int totalWeight = 0;
                        foreach (var w in weights) { totalWeight += w.Value(); }
                        int pick = counter % Math.Max(totalWeight, 1);
                        int cumulative = 0;
                        for (int i = 0; i < models.Count; i++)
                        {
                            cumulative += weights[i].Value();
                            if (pick < cumulative) { return models[i].ToString(); }
                        }
                    }
                }
                // Default: priority — return first model
                return models[0].ToString();
            }" />
        
    

    
    
        
            
        
        
            
                
                
                    application/json
                
                @{
                    return new JObject(
                        new JProperty("error", new JObject(
                            new JProperty("message", "Model could not be detected from request body or path"),
                            new JProperty("type", "invalid_request_error"),
                            new JProperty("code", "missing_model_parameter"),
                            new JProperty("param", "model")
                        ))
                    ).ToString();
                }
            
        
    

    
    <set-variable name="response-id" value="@{
        var apiType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", "openai");
        var method = context.Request.Method;
        if (!apiType.StartsWith("responses") || (method != "GET" && method != "DELETE")) {
            return String.Empty;
        }
        var path = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("routing-processed-path", String.Empty);
        return path.Substring(path.LastIndexOf('/') + 1);
    }" />

    
    <set-variable name="selected-api-version" value="@{
        var apiType = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", "openai");
        var modelId = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("requestedModel", "unknown");
        var models = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("config-models");
        var apiTypeConfig = context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type-config");

        // Model-specific API versions
        var modelConfig = models?[modelId];
        if (modelConfig != null) {
            if (apiType.Equals("inference", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) && modelConfig["inferenceApiVersion"] != null) {
                return modelConfig["inferenceApiVersion"].ToString();
            }
            if (apiType.Equals("openai", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) && modelConfig["apiVersion"] != null) {
                return modelConfig["apiVersion"].ToString();
            }
        }

        // Fall back to api-type config version
        var apiTypeVersion = apiTypeConfig?["api-version"]?.ToString();
        if (!String.IsNullOrEmpty(apiTypeVersion)) {
            return apiTypeVersion;
        }

        // Fallback defaults
        return apiType.Equals("responses", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) ? "2025-03-01-preview" : "2024-10-21";
    }" />

    
        @($"Unified AI - Request processed: {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("routing-processed-path", "n/a")} | API: {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("api-type", "n/a")} | Model: {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("requestedModel", "n/a")} | Alias: {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("original-model-alias", "")} | Op: {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("openai-compat-operation", "")} | Streaming: {context.Variables.GetValueOrDefault("is-streaming", false)}")
